message:
🌱 Add microcks: Enable Google PubSub Emulator mission (#821)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "microcks-1846-enable-google-pubsub-emulator",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "microcks: Enable Google PubSub Emulator",
+    "description": "Enable Google PubSub Emulator. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current microcks deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your Microcks deployment:\n```bash\n# If deployed via Helm on Kubernetes\nkubectl get pods -n microcks\nhelm list -n microcks 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n\n# If deployed via Docker Compose\ndocker compose ps\n```\nThis feature requires Microcks 1.10.0+ which adds Google PubSub Emulator support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review microcks configuration",
+        "description": "Review the Microcks configuration for PubSub settings:\n```bash\n# Check Helm values for async features\nhelm get values microcks -n microcks 2>/dev/null\n\n# Or check Docker Compose configuration\ncat docker-compose.yml | grep -A5 PUBSUB\n```\nThe Google PubSub Emulator support requires two environment variables: `PUBSUB_EMULATOR_HOST` and `PUBSUB_PROJECT_ID` to configure a client to use the emulator instead of the real PubSub service."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Enable Google PubSub Emulator",
+        "description": "The fix enables Google PubSub Emulator support in Microcks:\n\n- Set `PUBSUB_EMULATOR_HOST` on the PubSub producer to configure it for an emulator\n- Use a host name in the `endpointUrl` spec for the PubSub consumer to consume from an emulator\n\nExample Helm values:\n```yaml\nasync:\n  googlepubsub:\n    emulator:\n      enabled: true\n      host: \"pubsub-emulator:8085\"\n      project: \"my-test-project\"\n```\n\nSee the fix PR for details: https://github.com/microcks/microcks/pull/1851"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Verify the PubSub Emulator integration works:\n```bash\n# Check Microcks async minion logs for PubSub connections\nkubectl logs -l app=microcks-async-minion -n microcks --tail=50\n\n# Verify the emulator environment variables are set\nkubectl get pods -n microcks -l app=microcks -o jsonpath='{.items[0].spec.containers[0].env}' | jq .\n```\nConfirm that Microcks can produce and consume messages via the PubSub Emulator."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Use `PUBSUB_EMULATOR_HOST` on the PubSub producer to configure for an emulator\n- Use a host name in the endpointUrl spec for the PubSub consumer to consume from an emulator",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "microcks",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "microcks"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/microcks/microcks/issues/1846",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/microcks/microcks",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/microcks/microcks/pull/1851"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 27,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with microcks installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:38:16.556Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+  }
+}
